headings: BROWNSTONE CONSTRUCTION, LTD. SUBCONTRACT FOR Allegra at Shreveport
text: - 3.1. Subcontractor agrees to furnish all necessary skilled labor, tools, materials, equipment, supervision, services, supplies, and insurance for the work as described in Exhibit 'A' in strict accordance with the Contract Documents and subject to the entire satisfaction and approval of the Owner, any lender for the Project, Architect, Engineer  and  Contractor  or  their  authorized  representatives  (the  'Subcontract  Work')  for  the  amount  shown  in Section 10 hereof. Subcontractor shall, for no additional compensation, furnish labor, tools, materials, equipment, supervision,  services,  and  supplies,  and  all  necessary  and  attendant  accessories,  reasonably  inferable  from  the Contract Documents and incidentally required for a complete installation of the Subcontract Work.
